instruction: Please put together a short brief for line leads to use during 5S walkthroughs, save it in /Operations/Training, and title it "5S Walkthrough Observation Guide".

rule_ref.rule_text: When she needs reusable materials for training or process work, she prefers creating a template rather than a one-off document.
rule_ref.canonical_answer: Whenever I'm building something I'll reuse, I always make it as a template.

attributes.title: 5S Walkthrough Talking Points
attributes.content_brief: Speaker notes for a supervisor leading a shop-floor 5S walkthrough.

attributes.title: New-Hire Safety Huddle Memo
attributes.content_brief: One-page reminder for line leads before an orientation shift.

attributes.title: A3 Problem-Solving Worksheet
attributes.content_brief: Blank format used during continuous-improvement investigations.

attributes.title: Packaging Cell Kaizen Recap
attributes.content_brief: Summary of findings and follow-ups from a recent improvement event.
